title: Webinar: Trends Shaping Private Markets in 2024
body:
Adams Street Partners- Thu, 04/25/2024 - 00:52

Webinar: Trends Shaping Private Markets in 2024

Image

Jeff Diehl, Managing Partner & Head of Investments, joined a webinar programmed by Economist Impact and supported by Adams Street Partners, to discuss trends that will influence private equity strategies.

Participants discussed investors’ increasing optimism about the outlook for private markets in 2024, with expectations that liquidity, fundraising and returns will improve as interest rates begin to decline amid receding inflation. Panelists expect these dynamics to boost megatrends including the continuing digitization of the global economy, driven in large part by generative AI, which is likely to be a positive for venture and growth-stage disruptors in particular.

Participants also included Elena Manola-Bonthond, Chief Investment Officer at CERN Pension Fund, and Claudia Zeisberger, Professor of Entrepreneurship and Family Enterprise at INSEAD. The session was moderated by Vaibhav Sahgal, Principal, Policy & Insights, at Economist Impact.

Adams Street Partners

Adams Street Partners is a global investment firm managing a comprehensive suite of private markets investment solutions. The firm provides private equity and private credit strategies to institutional investors, growth capital to innovative companies, and evergreen funds that offer access to multiple strategies through a single, investor-friendly commitment. The firm also supports wealth advisors with private markets solutions structured to be more flexible and accessible than traditional closed-end funds. With over 50 years of experience, Adams Street leverages deep market insights, global relationships, and proprietary data as it seeks to help investors achieve long-term investment goals. The firm is 100% employee-owned, manages $65 billion in assets, and operates out of 14 offices globally. Visit adamsstreetpartners.com
